events.name: Patrick Watson
events.description: Canadian singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist brings his indie folk and art rock sound to Seattle. Known for his ethereal vocals and cinematic arrangements.

events.name: Seattle Symphony: Xian Zhang Conducts Mozart
events.venue: Benaroya Hall - S. Mark Taper Foundation Auditorium
events.description: Experience classical masterpieces as Music Director Xian Zhang leads the Seattle Symphony through an evening of Mozart's timeless compositions.

events.name: Pub Choir
events.description: The popular Australian-born phenomenon comes to Seattle - a mass karaoke experience where strangers come together to sing in three-part harmony. No experience required!

events.name: Treaty Oak Revival
events.description: West Texas country rock band brings their raw, energetic sound to Seattle as part of their West Texas Degenerate Tour with special guests William Clark Green and Huser Brothers.

events.name: José González
events.description: Swedish-Argentine indie folk artist known for his delicate fingerpicking and haunting vocals. Features songs from his acclaimed albums including 'Veneer' and 'Vestiges & Claws'.

events.name: LeAnn Rimes
events.venue: Benaroya Hall - S. Mark Taper Foundation Auditorium
events.description: Grammy-winning country and pop vocalist performs at Benaroya Hall. Known for hits like 'Blue' and 'How Do I Live,' Rimes brings her powerful voice to Seattle.

events.name: La Dispute
events.description: Michigan post-hardcore band known for their poetic lyrics and intense live performances. A must-see for fans of emotive, spoken-word style rock.

events.name: The Academy Is...
events.description: Chicago pop-rock band celebrates the 20th anniversary of their debut album 'Almost Here.' Features William Beckett and the band performing their classic emo-pop hits.

events.name: Jesus Christ Superstar
events.description: The iconic rock opera by Andrew Lloyd Webber and Tim Rice comes to Seattle. This timeless musical tells the story of the final days of Jesus through powerful rock music.

events.name: Carmen - Seattle Opera
events.description: Bizet's passionate and dramatic opera about love, jealousy, and fate. One of the most popular operas of all time featuring the famous 'Habanera' and 'Toreador Song.'

events.name: Yebba
events.description: Grammy-winning soul singer from Arkansas brings her Jean Tour to Seattle. Known for collaborations with Mark Ronson, Ed Sheeran, and Sam Smith, plus her stunning solo work.

events.name: Chet Faker
events.description: Australian electronic musician Nick Murphy returns to his Chet Faker moniker for a night of soulful electronica, featuring hits like 'Gold' and '1998.'
